JRC ·Navigation & Electronics

JRC JMA-5300MK2 Radar

Spare parts for JRC JMA-5300MK2 series marine radars – scanner units, displays, magnetrons.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
NKE-2103-6Scanner Unit, 6 ft X-band (JMA-5312-6/6HS) – JMA-5312-6 / 6HS
NKE-2254-7Scanner Unit, 7 ft X-band (JMA-5322-7)
NKE-2254-9Scanner Unit, 9 ft X-band (JMA-5322-9)
NKE-2254-6HSScanner Unit, 6 ft Hi-Spd X-band (JMA-5322-6HS)
NKE-1130Scanner Unit, 12 ft S-band (JMA-5332-12)
NWZ-173Display Unit, 19" LCD (NWZ-173) – JMA-5300MK2 series
NDC-1417Radar Process Unit – JMA-5300MK2 series
NCE-5171Operation Unit – JMA-5300MK2 series
NQE-3151AJunction Box – JMA-5332-12
NQE-3141-4AInterswitch Unit, 4-port (option) – JMA-5300MK2 series
NQE-3141-8AInterswitch Unit, 8-port (option) – JMA-5300MK2 series
NBA-5111Rectifier Unit (option for 5312/5322; std for 5332) – JMA-5312-6/6HS / JMA-5322-7/9/6HS
MAF1565NMagnetron, X-band (replace @ 4,000 h) – Part code 5VMAA00102 – JMA-5312-6 / 6HS
M1568BSMagnetron, X-band (replace @ 4,000 h) – Part code 5VMAA00106 – JMA-5322-7 / 9
M1555Magnetron, X-band Hi-Spd (replace @ 4,000 h) – Part code 5VMAA00104 – JMA-5322-6HS
7BDRD0048Scanner Motor (replace @ 10,000 h) – Part code 7BDRD0048 – JMA-5312-6/6HS
7BDRD0044Scanner Motor (replace @ 10,000 h) – Part code 7BDRD0044 – JMA-5322-7/9
7BDRD0045Scanner Motor Hi-Spd (replace @ 10,000 h) – Part code 7BDRD0045 – JMA-5322-6HS
MDBW10823Fan, Scanner Unit (replace @ 20,000 h) – Part code MDBW10823 – JMA-5300MK2 series
7BFRD0002Fan, Radar Process Circuit (replace @ 20,000 h) – Part code 7BFRD0002 – JMA-5300MK2 series
7BFRD0005Fan, Power Supply (replace @ 20,000 h) – Part code 7BFRD0005 – JMA-5300MK2 series
CML-771LCD Panel (replace @ 50,000 h) – Part code CML-771 – JMA-5300MK2 series
CR2032Backup Battery (replace every 5 years) CR2032 – Part code 5ZBCJ00012 – JMA-5300MK2 series
